notes: End-to-end demo against a LIVE `nockchain --fakenet` node — see docs/local-fakenet-guide.md.
The health step does a real TCP probe of the public gRPC listener (127.0.0.1:5555).
The peek step runs `nockchain-wallet show-balance` against the live node's public gRPC server.
Requires a running fakenet node and nockchain-wallet on PATH; without a node the probes report unreachable (run without --strict to inspect).

steps.title: Probe the live fakenet public gRPC listener
steps.expectation: the public gRPC endpoint at 127.0.0.1:5555 is reachable over TCP

steps.title: Read wallet balance from the live node via nockchain-wallet
steps.expectation: nockchain-wallet connects to the node's public gRPC server and returns balance output

invariants.title: watched endpoint matches the configured gRPC endpoint
